name: taskmaster-suite
description: Meta-bundle: the full clarification-to-execution workflow plus its wired companions — taskmaster, task-runner, stack-scan, code-architecture, the stack-agnostic review/process toolkit, and the pipeline's visual path (ui-ux, design-preview). Uninstall cleanly with /taskmaster-suite:uninstall — removes the bundle and prunes its auto-installed plugins.
